title: Elmasri & Navathe's Database System Architecture
description: A visual representation of the core database system components as outlined in the foundational textbook by Elmasri and Navathe.
relationships: Users interact with the DBMS to query the Stored Database
The DBMS software manages and controls access to the Stored Database
The DBA configures and maintains the DBMS and Database
All components run on underlying Hardware
